body: This will also make sure that we don't accidentally have a mask where at least some columns are masked out. Otherwise we can get div by zero errors (seen [here](https://buildkite.com/clima/climacore-ci/builds/5628#0196636d-be18-42bd-b028-a63ebc98d24c)). cc @Sbozzolo
title: Make mask IO unit tests deterministic
